atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports increasing fatigue.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports fatigue at the end of the day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes fatigue to age and general exhaustion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient continues to ride his bicycle approximately 20 to 30 miles.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient finds bicycle riding more challenging than in the past.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient requires breaks after longer rides.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient notes that his friend Tyler is consistently faster than him.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient underwent aortic valve replacement and ascending aortic aneurysm repair in January 2013.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no recent cardiac events.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no significant changes in his condition.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a palpable nodule in his right testicle for approximately six months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has not performed routine testicular self-exams.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been prompted to investigate further regarding the nodule.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient received both doses of the COVID-19 vaccine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an echocardiogram

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a stress test

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends a referral to cardiology

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The referral is to Dr. Vincent Sanchez

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders pulmonary function testing

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports a low exhalation phase observed during the physical exam

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a repeat alkaline phosphatase

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a complete metabolic panel

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports an elevated level

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow-up will be scheduled in approximately one year

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to contact the office with any questions or concerns
